components.charged_bytes_obligation: all emitted stream payloads and JCSP metadata must be inside archive.zip
components.typed_input_contract: named 1-D integer qint streams with alphabet size, offset, codec kind, and cached score-per-byte marginal
components.typed_output_contract: StreamSource records consumed without scorer state at compress time

components.charged_bytes_obligation: allocator metadata is planning-only unless packed in JCSP
components.typed_input_contract: StreamProximalCodec objects plus byte budget and cached marginal surfaces
components.typed_output_contract: per-stream target bytes, convergence flag, KKT residual, and allocation history

components.charged_bytes_obligation: quantizer choices must be recorded in archive manifest before exact eval
components.typed_output_contract: codec-specific lossless payloads after roundtrip verification

components.charged_bytes_obligation: hyperprior parameters and fallback decision must be charged or fixed in committed runtime
components.typed_input_contract: qint stream plus deterministic hyperprior config
components.typed_output_contract: BHv1 payload or AQv1 static fallback

components.charged_bytes_obligation: frequency tables, model ids, and all side information must be included in payload bytes
components.typed_input_contract: symbol stream derived from qints and offset

components.charged_bytes_obligation: JCSP must be a real archive member with runtime loader parity before dispatch
components.typed_input_contract: StackStreamResult payloads with actual byte counts
components.typed_output_contract: JCSP container bytes, then archive.zip member

composition_invariants: no scorer loads at inflate time
all side information is charged inside archive.zip
per-stream roundtrip is verified before pack
JCSP container byte budget includes metadata overhead
exact CUDA auth eval is required before score or rank claims

determinism_contract.cross_platform: manifest is pure JSON; future native/Rust/SIMD consumers must prove byte-identical output on macOS/Linux before promotion
determinism_contract.wire_endianness: JCSP uses explicit little-endian struct fields

next_patch: Build a byte-closed archive member that consumes JCSP at inflate, then claim lane and run exact CUDA auth eval on the exact archive.

no_op_fixture_semantics.purpose: exercise the typed end-to-end stack contract without claiming a changed contest archive

title: Joint ADMM plus Ballé hyperprior plus AQ arithmetic stack fixture
